merge_presets.label: .NET 8+ with C#
merge_presets.description: .NET backend with C# and ASP.NET Core
merge_presets.value:
- Backend: .NET 8+ with C# 12
- Framework: ASP.NET Core
- ORM: Entity Framework Core
- Testing: xUnit or NUnit

merge_presets.label: C# conventions
merge_presets.value:
- Follow .NET design guidelines (Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Design).
- Use nullable reference types (#nullable enable).
- Prefer records for immutable data types.
- Use LINQ appropriately for readability.
